entities.name: BEAUVERIA BASSIANA
entities.description: A mycopesticide fungus used for biological control of insect pests

entities.name: CHILO PARTELLUS
entities.description: The sorghum shoot borer, a target pest insect

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The host crop affected by the shoot borer

entities.name: VIRULENCE
entities.description: The capacity of a pathogen to cause disease or death in a host

entities.name: RAPD-PCR
entities.description: Random amplified polymorphic DNA-polymerase chain reaction used for genetic characterization

entities.name: LARVAL MORTALITY
entities.description: The rate of death among larvae used to assess fungal aggressiveness

entities.name: AGGRESSIVENESS
entities.description: The level of virulence of B. bassiana isolates categorized as highly, medium, or less aggressive

entities.name: DNA FINGERPRINTS
entities.description: Genetic profiles of isolates generated through RAPD-PCR

entities.name: CLIMATIC ZONE
entities.description: The environmental region, such as tropical or temperate, from which isolates were collected

entities.name: COLEOPTERAN INSECTS
entities.description: Beetles that served as the original hosts for some B. bassiana isolates

entities.name: LEPIDOPTERAN INSECTS
entities.description: Moths and butterflies that served as the original hosts for some B. bassiana isolates
